title: backupplanstrategydocument
content:
# backupplanstrategydocument v2.0 ## backuptaskinventory ### MySQLdatabasebackup
- backup：daysAM2:00，mysqldump
- backup：6hours，mysqlbinlog
- retainstrategy：retain7days，retain3days
- backuptarget：/data/backup/+ backup-nfs-01NFS
- RPO: 24hours，6hours
- RTO: 4hours ### filebackup
- backupscope：/data/uploads, /data/static, /etc/
- backup：rsync --partial --timeout=3600
- plantime：daysAM3:00
- backuptarget：backup-nfs-01:/backup/app01/
- retainstrategy：retain14days
- RPO: 24hours ### - scope：backupdata
- ：rclone sync
- plantime：daysAM4:00
- timeout：6hours
- target：dc-backup-bj
- ：100Mbps
- RPO: 48hours ## backupspace
- /data/backup/ capacity500GB
- cleanup：retain7daysbackup
- cleanupscript：/opt/scripts/backup_cleanup.sh
- cleanuptime：daysAM1:00backupexecute
author: DBA Team

title: backuprecoveryprocess
content:
# backuprecoveryprocess ## MySQLrecoveryprocess
1. confirmrecoverytargettime
2. backuprecovery: mysql < full_backup.sql
3. binlogtargettime: mysqlbinlog --stop-datetime=TARGET binlog.* | mysql
4. verificationdata: check
5. RTO: 4hours ## filerecoveryprocess
1. confirmneedsrecoveryfiledirectory
2. NFSbackuprecovery: rsync backup-nfs-01:/backup/app01/TARGET LOCAL_PATH
3. verificationfile: md5sum
4. RTO: 1hours ## recoveryprocessrecovery
1. start
2. backuprecoverydatabasefile
3. updateDNS
4. verificationservice
5. RTO: 8hours ## recovery
- ：times
- last time：2026-01-15
- times：2026-04-15
- content：recovery + recovery +
author: DBA Team
